tooling_sandboxing.detail: Tool execution runs unsandboxed by default; secure sandboxed execution requires opting into the third-party E2B service via an E2B_API_KEY rather than being enforced by the harness itself.

context_memory.detail: An OS-inspired memory model pins editable, persistent 'memory blocks' (core memory) in the context window across all sessions and offloads unlimited facts to a semantically-searchable archival memory store queried on demand.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: Tools flagged default_requires_approval pause execution for an explicit approve/deny before the tool runs - a built-in human-approval gate rather than a programmable pre-execution hook (the sibling Letta Code CLI has a richer PreToolUse/PostToolUse hook system, out of scope for this repo).

prompt_optimization.detail: The Agent Development Environment exposes a manually-edited 'System Instructions' panel plus editable persona/human memory blocks; no automatic prompt tuning or eval-driven optimization loop is documented for the core agent server.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: The published artifact is an open-source, self-hostable stateful-agent server you deploy via Docker and configure through the ADE (memory blocks, tools, personas); Letta's 'Constellation' is the managed hosted agent-cloud alternative.
